title: Technique Level 6B — Ornament Patterns
summary: Written-out grace notes, mordents, and turn figures in multiple keys — mastering Baroque and Classical ornamental technique.

exercises.title: Mordent Figures in C Major RH
exercises.summary: Written-out mordent (main-lower-main) on each scale degree in C.
exercises.goal: Play crisp mordent figures — quick lower neighbor and return.

license.notes: Written for the open starter curriculum.

exercises.title: Mordent Figures in C Major LH
exercises.summary: Written-out mordent on each scale degree in C, left hand.
exercises.goal: Build left hand mordent speed — quick ornaments in the bass.

license.notes: Written for the open starter curriculum.

exercises.title: Turn Figures in C Major RH
exercises.summary: Written-out turn (upper-main-lower-main) on scale degrees.
exercises.goal: Play smooth four-note turn figures — a Classical staple.

license.notes: Written for the open starter curriculum.

exercises.title: Turn Figures in G Major RH
exercises.summary: Written-out turns ascending through G major.
exercises.goal: Play turns with F# in G major — navigate the sharp.

license.notes: Written for the open starter curriculum.

exercises.title: Turn Figures in D Major RH
exercises.summary: Written-out turns ascending through D major.
exercises.goal: Navigate turns with F# and C# in D major.

license.notes: Written for the open starter curriculum.

exercises.title: Grace Note Approaches in C Major RH
exercises.summary: Quick approach note (grace) before each scale tone — written as eighth + quarter.
exercises.goal: Play quick approach notes before the main note — grace note style.

license.notes: Written for the open starter curriculum.

exercises.title: Grace Note Approaches in G Major RH
exercises.summary: Quick approach notes before each scale tone in G major.
exercises.goal: Play grace-style approaches with F# in G major.

exercises.title: Mordent Figures in G Major RH
exercises.summary: Mordent on each scale degree in G major.
exercises.goal: Play mordents with F# — flat-key and sharp-key mordent feel.

exercises.title: Turn Figures in F Major RH
exercises.summary: Written-out turns ascending through F major with Bb.
exercises.goal: Navigate turns in F major — smooth Bb navigation.

exercises.title: Mordent Figures in D Major RH
exercises.summary: Mordent on each scale degree in D major.
exercises.goal: Play crisp mordents with F# and C# in D major.

exercises.title: Grace Note Approaches in F Major RH

exercises.title: Turns with Accompaniment in C HT
exercises.summary: Right hand turns over left hand sustained notes.
exercises.goal: Maintain turns while the other hand holds — ornamental independence.

license.notes: Written for the open starter curriculum.

exercises.title: Mordents with Accompaniment in G HT
exercises.summary: Right hand mordents over left hand bass line in G major.
exercises.goal: Play mordents while the left hand moves independently.

exercises.title: Ornament Figures in Bb Major RH
exercises.summary: Mixed mordents and turns in Bb major.
exercises.goal: Navigate ornaments in flat keys — Bb and Eb under the fingers.

exercises.title: Ornament Figures in Eb Major RH
exercises.summary: Mixed mordents and turns in Eb major.
exercises.goal: Navigate ornaments in Eb — three flats under the fingers.

exercises.title: Ornament Figures in A Major RH

exercises.title: Ornament Figures in C Major LH

exercises.title: Speed Ornaments in C Major RH
exercises.summary: Rapid mordents and turns at elevated tempo.
exercises.goal: Play ornaments at 100 BPM — speed and clarity combined.

exercises.title: Ornamented Melody in C Major HT
exercises.summary: Simple melody with ornaments over Alberti bass.
exercises.goal: Play ornamented melody over accompaniment — musical context for ornaments.

exercises.title: Ornament Mastery Review HT
exercises.summary: Mixed ornaments across C, G, D, F keys — the L6B mastery test.
exercises.goal: Demonstrate ornamental fluency in both hands across multiple keys.
